title: Paywall offer — '$47/yr ($4/mo) — No Payment Due Now'
html:
Paywall trial CTA — "No Payment Due Now • Just $47.00 per year ($4/mo) • Continue for free" — likely a competitor / inspiration screenshot Yahir grabbed while iterating on the Brotein price ($44.99/yr ≈ $3.72/mo per the App Store landing copy).

brotein · revenuecat

related.label: Brotein App Store landing copy — 'gap between macro tracking and degen eating'
